nasb.text: and sold the sons of Judah and Jerusalem to the Greeks in order to remove them far from their territory,

esv.text: You have sold the people of Judah and Jerusalem to the Greeks in order to remove them far from their own border.

cnv.text: 你們把猶大人和耶路撒冷人賣給希臘人，使他們遠離自己的境界。

ccb.text: 并把犹大和耶路撒冷的居民卖给希腊人，使他们远离家乡。
